svg.title: Partitioning the GEMM output matrix among CUDA thread blocks
svg.desc: Kernel 13 maps blockIdx.x and threadIdx.x to output rows, and blockIdx.y and threadIdx.y to output columns. The output matrix D is divided into tiles, and one tile is enlarged as an illustrative four-by-four thread block where each in-bounds thread owns one output element.
svg.text: one CTA → one output tile of D
one in-bounds thread → one D[m, n] element
